sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36714" key="e(camoiri/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑξᾰμοιρία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n36714.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">arc of six degrees,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:356:30" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">356.30</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
